channel.title: Headlines - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Kanye West was booked as a festival headliner. Brands are now pulling their sponsorship - CNN
item.description:
1. Kanye West was booked as a festival headliner. Brands are now pulling their sponsorship  CNN
  2. Wireless Festival boss defends Kanye West appearance  BBC
  3. Ye offers to meet UK Jewish community as calls mount for him to be ditched from Wireless Festival  WRAL
  4. A music festival booked Kanye West, now known as Ye, and lost major sponsors  NPR
  5. Pressure grows to remove Ye, formerly known as Kanye West, as the headliner of London summer music festival  PBS

item.title: CBS will hand Colbert’s late-night time slot to ‘Comics Unleashed with Byron Allen’ - CNN
item.description:
1. CBS will hand Colbert’s late-night time slot to ‘Comics Unleashed with Byron Allen’  CNN
  2. CBS reveals how it will replace Stephen Colbert in late-night schedule  The Independent
  3. CBS SHIFTS “COMICS UNLEASHED with BYRON ALLEN” TO 11:35 PM BEGINNING FRIDAY, MAY 22  paramountpressexpress.com
  4. CBS reveals its replacement for Stephen Colbert's 'Late Show'  USA Today
  5. CBS to sell late-night hours to Byron Allen as Colbert show ends  Reuters

item.title: New Jersey Devils and Tom Fitzgerald Part Ways | STATEMENT - NHL.com
item.description:
1. New Jersey Devils and Tom Fitzgerald Part Ways | STATEMENT  NHL.com
  2. Devils GM Tom Fitzgerald out after five-plus seasons in role  ESPN
  3. Devils preparing for critical offseason after firing GM Fitzgerald  NHL.com
  4. New Jersey Devils Part With GM Tom Fitzgerald: 'Time To Move In A New Direction'  The Hockey News
  5. 5 biggest mistakes of Tom Fitzgerald's New Jersey Devils career  Pucks and Pitchforks

item.title: World Cup MBTA train ticket price announced; T says it will be more affordable than driving - CBS News
item.description:
1. World Cup MBTA train ticket price announced; T says it will be more affordable than driving  CBS News
  2. MBTA to charge $80 for train tickets for World Cup matches at Gillette Stadium  The Boston Globe
  3. MBTA spikes World Cup tickets to Gillette Stadium to $80 -- four times higher than for Patriots games  Boston Herald
  4. MBTA details transit plan, prices for World Cup matches at Gillette  WCVB
  5. Boston’s World Cup fans facing outrageous 400% increase in train ticket pricing  New York Post

item.title: Neurocrine to Acquire Soleno Therapeutics, Expanding Its Endocrinology and Rare Disease Portfolio - PR Newswire
item.description:
1. Neurocrine to Acquire Soleno Therapeutics, Expanding Its Endocrinology and Rare Disease Portfolio  PR Newswire
  2. Neurocrine bets nearly $3bn on deal for insatiable hunger treatment  Financial Times
  3. Neurocrine expands into metabolic diseases with $2.9 billion Soleno buyout  CNBC
  4. Neurocrine Biosciences Details $2.9B Soleno Buyout, Touts Vykat XR as Potential Blockbuster  Yahoo Finance
  5. Neurocrine Biosciences to buy Soleno Therapeutics in $2.9B deal  Axios
